# MDE 1.4.9

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Kept cached AI Summary and Translation results visible when the current Markdown file is reopened or refreshed.
- Prevented the read-only AI result editor from briefly blanking during parent UI refreshes by keeping its internal editor callbacks stable.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added a focused AI document-scope helper so the renderer can keep AI result state tied to the selected file while the file contents are reloading.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for cached AI result visibility during same-file reloads.

## Documentation

- Updated the Chinese AI user manual to describe that cached AI results remain in the editor area when the current file is reopened or refreshed.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm run build`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high`
- `npx npm@10 install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions should publish macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts for x64 and arm64.
- GitHub Actions should publish the Windows x64 NSIS installer and update metadata.
